contract: CLI `migrate` advances an installed part when the registry itemSchemaVersion moves; `update` advances version/sourceHash; `rollback` restores locked content. Every part below carries the schemaVersion it migrates to and its lifecycle version.

parts.name: button
parts.migrationNotes: Initial authored resident primitive; no installed API migration exists yet.

parts.name: chart
parts.migrationNotes: Adds first-party chart vocabulary and renderer support; chart output is SVG/data-table display data, not third-party runtime execution.

parts.name: agent-native-studio-workspace
parts.migrationNotes: Aggregate workspace pack for the public Agent-Native template family; installs every public template workspace as one cohesive graph while keeping Harness governance and the real Agent-Native gateway as runtime owners.

parts.name: analytics-workspace
parts.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Analytics template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.
